fa-car-garage.appearanceId: car silhouette inside an arched or rectangular garage opening; automobile shape framed by a building entrance
fa-car-garage.functionalityId: navigates to garage or parking management features; opens vehicle storage or home garage settings
fa-car-garage.intentId: manage a home garage or vehicle storage space; access parking or garage-related controls

fa-car-mirrors.appearanceId: front-facing car outline with two side mirror arms extending outward; vehicle profile highlighting the wing mirror pair
fa-car-mirrors.functionalityId: opens vehicle mirror adjustment or safety settings; indicates side-mirror or driver-assistance features
fa-car-mirrors.intentId: adjust or check vehicle mirror configuration; access driving visibility or safety settings

fa-car-on.appearanceId: side-profile car silhouette with a power or activation indicator; automobile outline with a small on-state symbol
fa-car-on.functionalityId: activates or starts a connected vehicle remotely; turns on car ignition or vehicle system
fa-car-on.intentId: remotely start or power on a vehicle; enable a car or fleet device

fa-car-side.appearanceId: flat side-profile silhouette of a sedan with four wheels and a curved roofline; lateral outline of a passenger automobile
fa-car-side.functionalityId: indicates vehicle type or transportation mode; selects a car or driving option
fa-car-side.intentId: choose a car travel mode or vehicle option; represent general automobile transportation

fa-car-side-bolt.appearanceId: side-profile car silhouette with a lightning bolt overlaid or alongside; automobile outline combined with an electric flash symbol
fa-car-side-bolt.functionalityId: indicates an electric vehicle option; selects or filters for electric car features
fa-car-side-bolt.intentId: find or manage an electric vehicle; access EV charging or range information

fa-car-tilt.appearanceId: car silhouette depicted at an angle as if tipped sideways or on a tow tilt; automobile outline rotated or leaning on one side
fa-car-tilt.functionalityId: indicates a vehicle breakdown or towing situation; marks a roadside assistance or tilt-sensor event
fa-car-tilt.intentId: request towing or roadside assistance; report a tilted or overturned vehicle

fa-car-tunnel.appearanceId: car silhouette entering a curved tunnel arch opening; automobile outline inside a semicircular passage
fa-car-tunnel.functionalityId: indicates a tunnel route or underground passage; marks a toll or tunnel navigation point
fa-car-tunnel.intentId: navigate through a road tunnel; identify a tunnel on a route or map

fa-car-wash.appearanceId: car silhouette with droplets or vertical spray lines around it; automobile outline surrounded by water spray marks
fa-car-wash.functionalityId: locates or opens a car wash service; indicates a vehicle cleaning station
fa-car-wash.intentId: find a nearby car wash facility; schedule or access a vehicle cleaning service

fa-car-wrench.appearanceId: car silhouette with a wrench tool overlaid or adjacent; automobile outline combined with a repair spanner shape
fa-car-wrench.functionalityId: opens vehicle maintenance or repair tracking; schedules a car service appointment
fa-car-wrench.intentId: manage vehicle service or repair needs; find a mechanic or auto-repair resource

fa-caravan.appearanceId: side-profile of a box-shaped trailer with a rounded roof, windows, and a tow hitch; recreational travel trailer outline with axle and wheels
fa-caravan.functionalityId: indicates a caravan or RV campsite option; marks a towable accommodation or camping vehicle
fa-caravan.intentId: find or manage a caravan or camping trailer; plan a road trip with a towed living unit

fa-caravan-alt.appearanceId: side-profile travel trailer with a slightly different roofline or window arrangement than the standard caravan; alternate towable home outline
fa-caravan-alt.functionalityId: selects an alternative caravan style or variant; marks a different type of towed camping vehicle
fa-caravan-alt.intentId: choose a specific caravan design or model; compare alternate towed accommodation options

fa-card-club.appearanceId: playing card outline containing a three-lobed club suit symbol; rectangular card face showing the trefoil club shape
fa-card-club.functionalityId: selects the clubs suit in a card game action; indicates a club-card category or filter
fa-card-club.intentId: play or identify a clubs-suited card; navigate to a clubs category in a card game

fa-card-diamond.appearanceId: playing card outline containing a four-pointed diamond rhombus; rectangular card face showing a rotated square suit symbol
fa-card-diamond.functionalityId: selects the diamonds suit in a card game action; indicates a diamond-card category or filter
fa-card-diamond.intentId: play or identify a diamonds-suited card; navigate to a diamonds category in a card game

fa-card-heart.appearanceId: playing card outline containing a heart suit symbol with two rounded lobes and a downward point; rectangular card face showing the heart shape
fa-card-heart.functionalityId: selects the hearts suit in a card game action; indicates a heart-card category or filter
fa-card-heart.intentId: play or identify a hearts-suited card; navigate to a hearts category in a card game

fa-card-spade.appearanceId: playing card outline containing a spade suit symbol with an inverted heart top and a small stem; rectangular card face showing the spade shape
fa-card-spade.functionalityId: selects the spades suit in a card game action; indicates a spade-card category or filter
fa-card-spade.intentId: play or identify a spades-suited card; navigate to a spades category in a card game

fa-cards.appearanceId: two overlapping playing cards fanned slightly showing their faces; pair of rectangular card shapes stacked at an angle
fa-cards.functionalityId: opens a card game or deck management view; displays a hand of playing cards
fa-cards.intentId: access a card game or card-based feature; manage a deck or hand of playing cards

fa-cards-blank.appearanceId: two overlapping cards fanned slightly with blank unprinted faces; pair of plain white rectangular card shapes
fa-cards-blank.functionalityId: creates or selects blank or custom playing cards; opens a card template for editing
fa-cards-blank.intentId: design or customize a blank playing card; start with an empty card template

fa-caret-circle-down.appearanceId: downward-pointing solid triangle centered inside a full circle outline; filled downward arrowhead enclosed in a circular border
fa-caret-circle-down.functionalityId: expands a collapsed section or dropdown menu downward; scrolls or moves content downward
fa-caret-circle-down.intentId: reveal more content below; open a dropdown or expand a folded section

fa-caret-circle-left.appearanceId: leftward-pointing solid triangle centered inside a full circle outline; filled left arrowhead enclosed in a circular border
fa-caret-circle-left.functionalityId: navigates to the previous item or page; moves focus or content to the left
fa-caret-circle-left.intentId: go back to the previous view or item; shift content or selection leftward

fa-caret-circle-right.appearanceId: rightward-pointing solid triangle centered inside a full circle outline; filled right arrowhead enclosed in a circular border
fa-caret-circle-right.functionalityId: navigates to the next item or page; moves focus or content to the right
fa-caret-circle-right.intentId: advance to the next view or item; shift content or selection rightward

fa-caret-circle-up.appearanceId: upward-pointing solid triangle centered inside a full circle outline; filled upward arrowhead enclosed in a circular border
fa-caret-circle-up.functionalityId: collapses an expanded section or scrolls upward; moves content or focus upward
fa-caret-circle-up.intentId: hide or collapse expanded content above; scroll back to the top of a section

fa-caret-down.appearanceId: small solid downward-pointing triangle standing alone; compact filled wedge pointing toward the bottom
fa-caret-down.functionalityId: opens a dropdown menu or selector; expands a collapsible list or panel downward
fa-caret-down.intentId: reveal additional options or choices below; open a menu or expand a section

fa-caret-left.appearanceId: small solid leftward-pointing triangle standing alone; compact filled wedge pointing toward the left
fa-caret-left.functionalityId: navigates to the previous item or collapses a panel to the left; moves a cursor or selection leftward
fa-caret-left.intentId: go back or move to the previous item; collapse a side panel or navigate left

fa-caret-right.appearanceId: small solid rightward-pointing triangle standing alone; compact filled wedge pointing toward the right
fa-caret-right.functionalityId: navigates to the next item or expands a panel to the right; moves a cursor or selection rightward
fa-caret-right.intentId: proceed forward or move to the next item; expand a side panel or navigate right

fa-caret-square-down.appearanceId: downward-pointing solid triangle centered inside a square outline; filled downward arrowhead enclosed in a rectangular border
fa-caret-square-down.functionalityId: opens a dropdown or expands content downward within a box container; collapses upward to reveal lower content
fa-caret-square-down.intentId: expand or reveal content below within a boxed area; open a square-framed dropdown

fa-caret-square-left.appearanceId: leftward-pointing solid triangle centered inside a square outline; filled left arrowhead enclosed in a rectangular border
fa-caret-square-left.functionalityId: navigates back or collapses content to the left within a box container; moves selection leftward in a panel
fa-caret-square-left.intentId: go to the previous item within a boxed interface; collapse or shift content left

fa-caret-square-right.appearanceId: rightward-pointing solid triangle centered inside a square outline; filled right arrowhead enclosed in a rectangular border
fa-caret-square-right.functionalityId: navigates forward or expands content to the right within a box container; moves selection rightward in a panel
fa-caret-square-right.intentId: advance to the next item within a boxed interface; expand or shift content right

fa-caret-square-up.appearanceId: upward-pointing solid triangle centered inside a square outline; filled upward arrowhead enclosed in a rectangular border
fa-caret-square-up.functionalityId: collapses expanded content upward within a box container; scrolls or moves selection upward in a panel
fa-caret-square-up.intentId: collapse or hide content below within a boxed area; scroll upward in a square-framed section

fa-caret-up.appearanceId: small solid upward-pointing triangle standing alone; compact filled wedge pointing toward the top
fa-caret-up.functionalityId: collapses a dropdown menu or expanded section upward; moves a cursor or selection upward
fa-caret-up.intentId: close an open menu or collapse an expanded panel; move focus upward in a list

fa-carpool.appearanceId: car silhouette with multiple person figures inside or alongside; vehicle outline containing two or more passenger shapes
fa-carpool.functionalityId: activates or joins a carpool or ride-sharing option; matches a user with shared-ride passengers
fa-carpool.intentId: share a car ride with others to save cost or reduce emissions; find or offer a carpool arrangement

fa-carrot.appearanceId: tapered orange root vegetable with leafy green tops sprouting from the narrow end; elongated cone shape with feathery stems
fa-carrot.functionalityId: tags content as vegetable or food-related; labels a recipe or grocery item as a carrot
fa-carrot.intentId: find or categorize carrot-based recipes or food items; represent vegetable or healthy-eating content

fa-cars.appearanceId: two car silhouettes side by side or slightly overlapping; pair of automobile outlines grouped together
fa-cars.functionalityId: displays a fleet or multiple vehicle listing; filters or browses multiple car options
fa-cars.intentId: compare or manage multiple vehicles; browse a fleet or car inventory

fa-cart-arrow-down.appearanceId: shopping cart body with a downward-pointing arrow overlaid on the basket area; wheeled cart outline with a downward chevron inside
fa-cart-arrow-down.functionalityId: downloads or pulls items into the shopping cart; adds a product to the cart from a remote source
fa-cart-arrow-down.intentId: import or save items into the cart; retrieve products for purchase

fa-cart-arrow-up.appearanceId: shopping cart body with an upward-pointing arrow overlaid on the basket area; wheeled cart outline with an upward chevron inside
fa-cart-arrow-up.functionalityId: exports or pushes items out of the shopping cart; submits or uploads cart contents
fa-cart-arrow-up.intentId: submit cart items for processing or checkout; send or upload selected products

fa-cart-circle-arrow-down.appearanceId: shopping cart body with a circle badge containing a downward arrow in the lower corner; wheeled cart outline with a circular down-arrow overlay
fa-cart-circle-arrow-down.functionalityId: downloads or imports items into the cart via a circular action badge; adds products to the cart from a source
fa-cart-circle-arrow-down.intentId: pull items into the cart from an external list; save products to the cart for later

fa-cart-circle-arrow-up.appearanceId: shopping cart body with a circle badge containing an upward arrow in the lower corner; wheeled cart outline with a circular up-arrow overlay
fa-cart-circle-arrow-up.functionalityId: uploads or submits cart contents via a circular action badge; sends items from the cart to checkout
fa-cart-circle-arrow-up.intentId: push cart items to a next step or external system; submit or export the current cart

fa-cart-circle-check.appearanceId: shopping cart body with a circle badge containing a checkmark in the lower corner; wheeled cart outline with a circular tick overlay
fa-cart-circle-check.functionalityId: confirms or validates the shopping cart contents; marks the cart as reviewed and approved
fa-cart-circle-check.intentId: confirm items in the cart are ready for purchase; verify cart contents before proceeding

fa-cart-circle-exclamation.appearanceId: shopping cart body with a circle badge containing an exclamation mark in the lower corner; wheeled cart outline with a circular warning overlay
fa-cart-circle-exclamation.functionalityId: alerts the user to a cart issue or error; warns about a problem with an item in the cart
fa-cart-circle-exclamation.intentId: resolve a cart warning or product issue; address an alert before completing the purchase

fa-cart-circle-plus.appearanceId: shopping cart body with a circle badge containing a plus sign in the lower corner; wheeled cart outline with a circular add overlay
fa-cart-circle-plus.functionalityId: adds a new item to the shopping cart; creates or expands the cart with an additional product
fa-cart-circle-plus.intentId: add more products to the cart; build up a shopping cart with new items

fa-cart-circle-xmark.appearanceId: shopping cart body with a circle badge containing an X mark in the lower corner; wheeled cart outline with a circular remove overlay
fa-cart-circle-xmark.functionalityId: removes all items from or deletes the shopping cart; cancels the current cart session
fa-cart-circle-xmark.intentId: clear or discard the shopping cart; cancel the current product selection

fa-cart-flatbed.appearanceId: flat platform cart with a low rectangular deck and small wheels underneath; open-decked dolly or pallet trolley silhouette
fa-cart-flatbed.functionalityId: indicates a flatbed cart or pallet-moving tool; marks a logistics or warehouse transport item
fa-cart-flatbed.intentId: manage or track items on a flatbed or pallet cart; access warehouse or logistics cart features

fa-cart-flatbed-empty.appearanceId: flat platform cart with an empty rectangular deck and no load on top; bare open-decked dolly silhouette with no cargo
fa-cart-flatbed-empty.functionalityId: indicates an available or unloaded flatbed cart; marks an empty pallet or logistics carrier
fa-cart-flatbed-empty.intentId: identify an available flatbed cart for loading; check if a logistics cart is ready for use

fa-cart-minus.appearanceId: shopping cart body with a minus sign overlaid on or beside the basket; wheeled cart outline combined with a subtraction symbol
fa-cart-minus.functionalityId: removes one item from the shopping cart; decreases the quantity of a product in the cart
fa-cart-minus.intentId: take a product out of the cart; reduce the number of items selected for purchase

fa-cart-plus.appearanceId: shopping cart body with a plus sign overlaid on or beside the basket; wheeled cart outline combined with an addition symbol
fa-cart-plus.functionalityId: adds an item to the shopping cart; increases the quantity of a product in the cart
fa-cart-plus.intentId: place a product into the cart; expand the cart with an additional item

fa-cart-shopping.appearanceId: side-view shopping cart with a wire basket body, angled handle, and two small wheels; wheeled retail cart outline with a basket frame
fa-cart-shopping.functionalityId: opens the shopping cart page; displays all items selected for purchase
fa-cart-shopping.intentId: review products added to the cart; proceed toward completing a purchase

fa-cart-shopping-fast.appearanceId: shopping cart silhouette with motion speed lines trailing behind it; wheeled cart outline with horizontal dash marks indicating velocity
fa-cart-shopping-fast.functionalityId: triggers a quick checkout or express purchase flow; initiates a fast-order or one-click buy action
fa-cart-shopping-fast.intentId: complete a purchase quickly with minimal steps; use express checkout for a faster buying experience

fa-cart-xmark.appearanceId: shopping cart body with an X mark overlaid on or inside the basket; wheeled cart outline combined with a cancel or close symbol
fa-cart-xmark.functionalityId: clears or cancels the entire shopping cart; removes all selected items from the purchase
fa-cart-xmark.intentId: discard the current cart and start over; cancel all items selected for purchase

fa-cash-register.appearanceId: boxy machine with a drawer at the base, a display screen or keys panel on the body, and a receipt printout at the top; classic point-of-sale terminal silhouette with a cash drawer
fa-cash-register.functionalityId: opens the point-of-sale or checkout terminal; processes a cash or payment transaction
fa-cash-register.intentId: complete a retail transaction at checkout; access the payment or sales register system
